Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. A tail-call interpreter in (nightly) Rust 27 upvotes, 0 comments
  2. Aegis – open-source FPGA silicon 87 upvotes, 8 comments
  3. OpenScreen is an open-source alternative to Screen Studio 397 upvotes, 68 comments
  4. Show HN: A game where you build a GPU 867 upvotes, 171 comments
  5. Show HN: OsintRadar – Curated directory for osint tools 49 upvotes, 5 comments
  6. Iguanaworks has closed and our products are no longer sold 70 upvotes, 9 comments
  7. Eight years of wanting, three months of building with AI 196 upvotes, 39 comments
  8. Someone at BrowserStack Is Leaking Users' Email Address 291 upvotes, 77 comments
  9. Scientists Figured Out How Eels Reproduce (2022) 72 upvotes, 15 comments
  10. Introduction to Computer Music (2009) [pdf] 201 upvotes, 61 comments
  11. Baby's Second Garbage Collector 19 upvotes, 2 comments
  12. Tracing Goroutines in Realtime with eBPF 19 upvotes, 3 comments
  13. Shared mutable state in Rust (2022) 28 upvotes, 6 comments
  14. Nanocode: The best Claude Code that $200 can buy in pure JAX on TPUs 18 upvotes, 3 comments
  15. My Google Workspace account suspension 206 upvotes, 101 comments
  16. Lisette a little language inspired by Rust that compiles to Go 196 upvotes, 98 comments
  17. Computational Physics (2nd Edition) 6 upvotes, 0 comments
  18. Friendica – A Decentralized Social Network 62 upvotes, 28 comments
  19. A Claude Code skill that makes Claude talk like a caveman, cutting token use 393 upvotes, 236 comments
  20. SPF/PC v4 for MS-DOS, FreeDOS, x86 16 upvotes, 4 comments
  21. Finnish sauna heat exposure induces stronger immune cell than cytokine responses 166 upvotes, 92 comments
  22. The threat is comfortable drift toward not understanding what you're doing 572 upvotes, 402 comments
  23. Codex is switching to API pricing based usage for all users 35 upvotes, 17 comments
  24. Artemis II crew see first glimpse of far side of Moon [video] 136 upvotes, 90 comments
  25. Phone-free bars and restaurants on the rise across the U.S. 33 upvotes, 16 comments
  26. Common drug tests lead to tens of thousands wrongful arrests a year 80 upvotes, 51 comments
  27. Perfmon – Consolidate your favorite CLI monitoring tools into a single TUI 9 upvotes, 2 comments
  28. German implementation of eIDAS will require an Apple/Google account to function 468 upvotes, 427 comments
  29. StackOverflow: Retiring the Beta Site 24 upvotes, 14 comments
  30. Hightouch (YC S19) Is Hiring 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 1:00am, 6 April 2026. Source here.
